channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 120 wickham lane, lots of rubbish dumped on the pavement, 14th March
item.description:
120 wickham lane have cleared out rubbish but have put them on the pavement. Rubbish blocking paths and flowing into the street also. Initially had it in the porch area of the property but now have moved it onto the street. Always having over filling bins also as not putting out on time or wrong items in recycling bin so doesn’t get collected.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven cracked pavement, highly dangerous, 14th March
item.description:
This pavement is really cracked and uneven. It’s a trip hazard and dangerous to walk on especially for people with mobility issues including using a wheelchair. This really needs prioritising. It has been reported by residents for several years, but nothing has been done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Frederick's Place, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working still, 14th March
item.description:
FixMyStreet ref: 8776393 This light still not working! Other lights have been looked at and some changed to new LED lights after I reported this problem. But this is still the old kind and not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talehangers Close, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Countdown not working, 14th March
item.description:
The countdown unit has been displaying this error message since early January. Very inconvenient!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 156, Old Street, Finsbury, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping outside my property, 14th March
item.description:
Dumped a tractor tyre outside my property for the second time. Photos show the tyre in 2023 and dumped outside my fence sometime during the day 14 th march 2026 this is the second time this tyre has been dumped the first was July 2025.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several pools of large amounts of beige vomit, 14th March
item.description:
On the crossing of manor road and Wickham Road at the traffic lights, a bit further up on Bromley Road and down manor road (on the south side of the road) I vomited quite a lot after a meal that made me sick (apologies I am heavily pregnant) and had no where alternative to vomit. This was this evening around 30 mins ago and will need to be cleaned as I had nothing to clean it with.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle shed, 14th March
item.description:
Graffiti on bike shed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 156, Old Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request for urgent removal of dumped rubbish causing health hazard, 14th March
item.description:
Subject: Request for urgent removal of dumped rubbish causing health hazard Dear Council Team, I would like to report a large pile of dumped rubbish in a public area which appears to have been accumulating for some time. The waste includes plastic bags, food containers, cardboard and other materials scattered on the ground. This situation is concerning as it could pose a health and environmental hazard to local residents. The rubbish may attract pests, produce unpleasant odours, and create an unsafe environment for people living nearby. I would appreciate it if the council could arrange for urgent clean-up and removal of the waste, and if possible investigate the source of the dumping to prevent it from happening again. I have attached a photo for your reference. Thank you for your assistance in helping keep the neighbourhood clean and safe.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish bin, 14th March
item.description:
Overflowing litter bin also contain dog mess please empty asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No 517 Van is parking on pavement., 14th March
item.description:
Their red van is too big for their driveway so they just park with half of it off of their drive way and on the public footpath causing an obstruction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised paving and electrical vanle trip hazard, 14th March
item.description:
The tree has uplifted the paving slabs which I have tripped over. There is also an electric cable and box often left on the pavement. This is very dangerous to pedestrians and it's a busy thoroughfare on the square tonthe tube station and theatre. I have tripped up here twice!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Crescent, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: South if bus stop, 14th March
item.description:
The pit seems to be sinking or collapsing, and the paving stones are uneven and some are unstable
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highgate Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electric sub station on footpath damaged., 14th March
item.description:
The electric sub station gate has been knocked down. .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Court Road, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti, 14th March
item.description:
Evelina Road Remove graffiti from rear wall of 1-6 Honiton Gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Evelina Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No real cleaning and clearing for over a year, 14th March
item.description:
The street cleaning does not happen. As a result the drains and gutters are clogged with rotten leaves. The road is literally getting a bed of topsoil building up in places!!!!! The pavements are a slippery mess. We used to have manual cleaning backed up with a huge vacuum sweeping machine etc. A tiny machine that can't clear anywhere near obstacles came once last year. I feel we are paying for a cleaning contract but the contractor is not doing the work and the council account manager isn't checking their work.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
